description_long: This is a digital representation of a young child standing with arms extended outward in a T-pose. The child has a medium build and is dressed in a short-sleeve t-shirt with a graphic on the front, paired with long jeans that feature a splattered pattern. The child wears sneakers and a wristband on the left wrist, and has short, straight, dark hair adorned with a small hair accessory. The facial features are soft and youthful, and the overall appearance is casual and suitable for an urban or suburban environment. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday style typical for children in city settings.
description: A young child in a T-pose, wearing a graphic t-shirt, patterned jeans, sneakers, and a wristband, with short straight hair and a casual urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's facial features, graphic t-shirt, wristband, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, plain back of the t-shirt, and the jeans' rear pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
